text:
Market today: The mood is cautious, driven by inflation fears and geopolitical jitters. Tech and chip names are sensitive to these macro winds, especially with your concentrated book.

Your holdings: SMH (-11.19%) and SOXL (-45.38%) are flagged for attention. Your QQQ/QQQI are also marked for trimming. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on the broader market sentiment and any further news on interest rates.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your risk, especially with your leveraged and concentrated positions.
plays: Trim QQQ/QQQI: Consider reducing exposure given the current market chop and your TRIM status.
Consider SMH/SOXL: Evaluate if current levels warrant further trimming or a stop adjustment given SELL status.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
